title: Sqlitelogictest crash on complex case query
poc: SELECT - 76 AS col2, CASE WHEN CAST ( - MAX ( DISTINCT - 75 ) AS INTEGER ) IS NOT NULL THEN + 4 * - + 48 * + 51 * - - 54 * - 77 * 46 WHEN NOT ( NULL ) IN ( + - ( - - 49 ) * - 1, - 41, - 14 - - CASE - - 1 WHEN - - 82 THEN - - 23 END / + 46 - - 87 * + 52 ) THEN 56 ELSE NULL END AS col2;
key_bug_features: Complex case query with nested conditions and casts
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value, description) VALUES (1, -76, 'Negative value'), (2, 1872896256, 'Large positive value');
CREATE TABLE another_table (ref_id INTEGER, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), status BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO another_table (ref_id, amount, status) VALUES (1, 100.50, TRUE), (2, NULL, FALSE);

SELECT -76 AS col2, CASE WHEN CAST(-MAX(DISTINCT -75) AS INTEGER) IS NOT NULL THEN +4 * - +48 * +51 * - -54 * -77 * 46 WHEN NOT (NULL) IN (+ - (- -49) * -1, -41, -14 - -CASE - -1 WHEN - -82 THEN - -23 END / +46 - -87 * +52) THEN 56 ELSE NULL END AS col2 FROM test_table;
